brand.name: Seam & Sole
brand.footerDescription: A colorful boutique for heavyweight graphic tees, expressive sneakers and outfit-building pieces with a polished editorial shopping experience.
brand.footerStatus: This site is a product of Softbridge Solutions

hero.title: Wear the drop.
hero.description: A colorful premium boutique for graphic tees, expressive sneakers and styled outfits. Cinematic motion, real product imagery and commerce-first interactions built for a professional launch.
hero.primaryImageAlt: Streetwear model wearing a colorful outfit
hero.floatingText: Explore product imagery, styled outfit paths and a quiz-powered recommendation flow built around the live catalog.

runway.title: A homepage that sells like a campaign.
runway.description: The first scroll becomes a commercial story: hero visuals, category energy, premium product cards and direct purchase paths.

categoryShowcase.title: Four lanes for every fit mood.

shopTheLook.title: Hotspots that turn styling into sales.
shopTheLook.description: Every hotspot is connected to a real product record, so editorial visuals become direct buying paths.
shopTheLook.helperText: Every hotspot is connected to a real product record, so editorial visuals become direct buying paths.

editorial.title: Shop the outfit, not just the product.
editorial.description: Editorial pages connect tees, sneakers and accessories into complete looks. Built for cinematic transitions, hotspots and scroll-triggered product reveals.

threeFeature.title: Real products in motion.
threeFeature.description: Sneaker and t-shirt imagery is layered like a boutique display, giving the section depth while keeping the focus on shoppable products.

finalPolish.title: Built like a real launch.
finalPolish.description: The storefront combines smooth navigation, a detailed recommendation quiz and admin-ready content editing for ongoing product updates.

cards.title: Command search
cards.text: A fast modal search layer turns the catalog into a boutique discovery tool instead of a static grid.

cards.title: Cinematic motion
cards.text: Soft route fades, scroll reset, progress, cursor glow and staged reveals create a polished drop-culture feel.

cards.title: Flexible catalog
cards.text: Products, categories, editorials and homepage copy are structured for easy updates as the boutique grows.

brandSignature.title: Not a template. A boutique system.
points: Real product and lifestyle photography only
Editable product imagery, pricing and content
Interactive Fit Quiz recommendations from the current catalog
